name: Nib Holdings Limited
analysis: NHF has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 12% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$7.0000, stop A$6.6924, target A$7.9228 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
